MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, STEPHEN K SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-28-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-04-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

3:45PM JURY DELIBERATION ROOM, MORGAN PRICKETT, PRO-TEM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT TERMS AND CONDITIONS STATED ON RECORD. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 1530 GOUGH ST. #706. A WRIT MAY ISSUE WITH STAY UNTIL 15-OCT-93, 5PM. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE MONEY JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,722.40. PLAINTIFF SHALL WAIVES ATTY FEES AND COSTS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADEL, OUSSIDNA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1530 GOUGH ST. #706 $1,722.40 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,722.40, STAYED UNTIL OCT-15-1993, LEASE FORFEITED
